detail.overviewBody: {service} is executed with a standardized workflow, supervised crews, and a clear checklist at every stage to ensure schedule and asset safety.
checklistItems: Confirm total volume and access conditions (stairs/elevator)
Finalize execution window and truck staging point
Classify fragile, high-value, and bulky items
Agree on packing materials and asset protection method

benefits: On-site survey and transparent quote before execution
Professional packing with carton boxes, PE film and bubble wrap
Truck and crew arranged based on actual volume
Damage compensation commitment for transport-related incidents
process: Survey and propose the best moving plan
Pack by category: fragile, electronics and bulky furniture
Transport with suitable trucks under active supervision
Install and arrange at destination, then handover

faqs.question: How is {service} priced?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on volume, route distance and loading conditions (stairs/elevator). Final quote is confirmed before work starts.

faqs.question: Do you support fragile-item packing?
faqs.answer: Yes. We use protective materials and dedicated labels for fragile categories to minimize impact risk.

benefits: Checklist and timeline per department
Labeling system for desks, devices and documents
Staged relocation to reduce operation disruption
Basic setup support at the new office
process: Survey current and destination office layouts
Categorize office assets and packing method
Dispatch trucks and crew by approved schedule
Handover against checklist after completion

faqs.question: Can office relocation be done outside business hours?
faqs.answer: Yes. We support evening and weekend windows to avoid disrupting your operations.

faqs.question: Are documents and IT equipment handled separately?
faqs.answer: Yes. They are packed and sealed by zone/team code, then handed over by checklist.

benefits: Support for parcel, bulky and on-site loading requests
Multiple truck options by route and payload
Secure tie-down and anti-shift handling
Fast dispatch for urgent delivery windows
process: Collect cargo and route information
Recommend truck type, packing and schedule
Load and secure cargo before departure
Deliver and confirm completion with recipient

faqs.question: Do you support same-day urgent transport?
faqs.answer: Yes. Depending on location and timing, we prioritize the nearest available truck.

faqs.question: Are there extra fees for bulky cargo?
faqs.answer: Additional handling/equipment fees may apply, but they are always disclosed and approved first.

benefits: Suitable for students, renters and compact rooms
Small trucks can access narrow alleys
Quick loading to shorten move time
Transparent pricing for tight budgets
process: Collect item list and pickup/drop locations
Recommend truck size and crew count
Quick-pack essential belongings
Move and arrange at the new room

faqs.question: Do I need to book room moving in advance?
faqs.answer: It is recommended to reserve early, especially on weekends and month-start/month-end dates.

faqs.question: Do you provide basic furniture disassembly?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can support basic disassembly/reassembly for beds, desks and shelves when needed.

benefits: Long-distance support across North - Central - South routes
Cost optimization by route and actual payload
Flexible pickup/drop windows aligned with operations
Cargo protection for long-haul trips
process: Survey route and loading/unloading points
Plan trucks and schedule by route segments
Pack, secure and seal cargo for transit
Deliver and reconcile records at destination

faqs.question: How is inter-province pricing calculated?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on distance, truck class, stop points and waiting time. We provide itemized quotes.

faqs.question: Do you support multi-drop deliveries?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can design multi-stop routes to optimize both time and cost.

benefits: Experienced with condo regulations and loading windows
Floor, elevator and corridor protection during move
Safe packing for furniture and electronics
Room-by-room arrangement after delivery
process: Confirm tower transport rules and constraints
Pack and label by apartment zones
Move in approved building windows
Handover, verify assets and complete acceptance

faqs.question: Do you coordinate with building management?
faqs.answer: Yes. We support slot registration, elevator booking and move-in policy compliance.

faqs.question: How do you move large furniture to high floors?
faqs.answer: We assess dimensions and pathways in advance, then choose safe disassembly or equipment-assisted methods.
